name: Kelvin-Helmholtz Instability

visual_attributes.size_and_scale: varies from small-scale cloud formations to large atmospheric waves

domain_specific_visual.FLUID_DYNAMICS: visible in cloud formations and atmospheric layers
domain_specific_visual.ASTRONOMICAL: observed in planetary atmospheres like Jupiter's Red Spot

secondary_functions: contributes to turbulence in fluid layers

domain_specific_functional.PLASMA_PHYSICS: relevant in plasma confinement and fusion research
domain_specific_functional.METEOROLOGY: used to study cloud dynamics and weather patterns

relationships.description: Developed mathematical solutions for the instability.
Describes the dynamics of the instability.

contextual_attributes.geographic_range: global, observed in various planetary atmospheres
contextual_attributes.cultural_significance: important in understanding atmospheric and fluid dynamics

contrastive_constraints: NOT simple cloud formations without wave patterns
